description: Health insurance premium lookup — annual premiums in INR (indicative, FY 2024-25)
notes: Premiums are indicative averages across major insurers
Family floater covers self + spouse + 2 children
Age is the eldest member's age for family floater
Tax benefit under Section 80D: ₹25,000 (self) + ₹25,000 (parents, ₹50,000 if senior citizen)
